description: CRIT-702 passThreshold `grep -c "kind:" promptnotes/src/lib/editor/types.ts outputs exactly 17` is unsatisfiable. types.ts contains `kind:` literal occurrences in many disjoint unions: EditorAction (~19 variants), EditorCommand (17 variants), FsError (5), SaveValidationError (2), SaveError (2 + nested), the Tier 0 structural assertions, JSDoc references, etc. The actual `kind:` count far exceeds 17 (rough manual count > 50). The intended check is presumably `kind:` occurrences only inside the EditorCommand union, but the threshold as written checks the whole file and will return a number unrelated to the 17-variant invariant, providing no useful signal in either direction.

evidence.snippet: EditorAction has 19 `kind:` arms; EditorCommand has 17 `kind:` arms; FsError has 5 `kind:` arms; SaveValidationError has 2 `kind:` arms; plus nested kinds in SaveError. Total `kind:` lexical occurrences in the file substantially exceed 17.
